text:
Once upon a time, in the heart of the Enchanted Forest, there was a gentle river named Luminara. Luminara flowed through the forest, its water clear and sparkling under the dappled sunlight that filtered through the trees. It was said that Luminara had the power to grant wishes, but only to those who could understand its language and sang a harmonious melody with it.

One sunny morning, a young girl named Elara wandered into the forest, lost and alone after a long day of helping her mother tend the village's crops. As she walked, she stumbled upon Luminara, its banks lush with wildflowers and birds singing sweetly. She sat by the riverbank, feeling the cool water against her hands and listening to the soothing sounds around her.

As the sun began to set, Elara closed her eyes and whispered a wish into the air: "I wish for my family to be happy and healthy." When she opened her eyes, she saw
